verdict: Paid lead engine is significantly outperforming legal benchmarks; focus now shifts to lead quality and intake speed.
diagnosis: Cost per lead this period is roughly $23 — far below the $72–$164 legal industry range on Meta — driven by 126 leads from $2,949 spend.

signals.headline: 126 leads at $23 each this period
signals.detail: Cost per lead sits roughly 3x below the legal category average on Meta. The debt collector angle is converting cold audiences efficiently.

signals.headline: 111 phone calls from Google profile
signals.detail: Local presence is generating meaningful direct calls with zero direction requests. Phone is the dominant intake channel right now.

signals.headline: 5-star review pushes total to 61
signals.detail: Reputation is intact and trending positive. New reviewer specifically named the attorney, which strengthens local search ranking signals.

signals.headline: 2,005 clicks but only 781 landing page views
signals.detail: Roughly 60% of clicks never reach the landing page. Page speed or redirect issues are likely leaking paid traffic before conversion.

signals.headline: Instagram following stuck at 26
signals.detail: Organic social is dormant with only 4 profile visits. Paid traffic is not translating into owned audience growth.

recommendations.title: Fix the click-to-landing-page drop-off
recommendations.detail: Only 781 of 2,005 clicks reached the page. Test page load speed on mobile and check for redirect issues. Recovering half that gap could lift leads meaningfully.

recommendations.title: Tighten intake speed on inbound calls
recommendations.detail: With 111 call clicks and 126 form leads, response time decides revenue. Consider a 5-minute callback rule and after-hours coverage to convert more contacts into signed cases.

recommendations.title: Test a retargeting layer for blog readers
recommendations.detail: Worth exploring a small retargeting budget against website visitors. Industry data suggests this approach can cut lead costs further while improving lead intent and quality.
